name: tic-tac-toe-nakama
description: Monorepo scripts for the tic-tac-toe Nakama project — orchestrates the Go server, Docker stack, and React client from one place.

scripts.test:client: npm --prefix client run typecheck && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.verify: npm run setup && npm run test && echo "\nAll checks passed. Run `npm run dev` to boot the full stack."
